---
title: "measuring coevolution in ecological communities"
author: "bob week"
output: 
  revealjs::revealjs_presentation:
    center: true
---

# communities are collections of species

![](ibest/IMG_20191001_133654.jpg){ width=84% }

# these species tend to interact

![](ibest/IMG_20191001_133721.jpg){ width=84% }


# interspecific interactions have consequences

![](ibest/IMG_20191001_133834.jpg){ width=84% }
